description.content: Football competition and league data
Returns a list of all countries covered by the API.
Returns all football competitions and leagues.
Returns detailed information about a specific competition.
Football team information and statistics
Returns a list of football teams, optionally filtered by competition.
Returns detailed information about a specific team.
Football player profiles and statistics
Returns a list of players, optionally filtered by team.
Returns detailed information and statistics for a specific player.
Football match fixtures, results, and live data
Returns a list of matches for a given date or competition.
Returns recently completed matches.
Returns detailed information about a specific match including lineups and events.
Returns starting lineup and substitutes for a specific match.
League tables and competition standings
Returns the league table/standings for a competition and season.
Match and player statistics
Returns detailed match statistics including possession, shots, and passes.

TheSports Football API provides real-time football data feeds covering competitions, teams, players, matches, live scores, lineups, statistics, standings, and match analysis worldwide. Supports football and soccer leagues including major domestic competitions and international tournaments.
